items.title: Time-Series LLMs, Explained with t0-alpha
items.summary: t0-alpha is a decoder-style patch transformer for probabilistic time-series forecasting. Raw series are split into 32-step patches, embedded, processed through causal time-attention and group-attention layers, and decoded into future quantiles rather than a single point forecast.
